description: You are a landscape architect and facilities planner for the city's Parks & Recreation department. Design the interior layout for a newly constructed botanical garden visitor center using the provided building shell. Create four distinct zones: 'Ticketing', 'Gift Shop', 'Workshop', and 'Conservatory'. Enclose the Gift Shop and Workshop with interior walls and install at least 6 large windows along the Conservatory walls. Define and name the four rooms ('Ticketing', 'Gift Shop', 'Workshop', 'Conservatory'), applying distinct floor colors or textures to at least 3 of these zones. Furnish the Conservatory with at least 15 plants and 2 benches; the Workshop with at least 4 tables and 16 chairs; and the Gift Shop and Ticketing areas with at least 6 shelving units and 3 desks or counters. Use only the built-in catalog and save the completed layout to overwrite the starter file.
